browser.reason: CDN @latest scan is CLI-checkable; export probe needs a per-URL harness
reduced-motion media-query is checkable; motion-neutralization needs positional comparison
video baseline diff is capture-only, not auto-judgeable
Chrome leg automatable; Safari/Firefox out of bdg scope
LCP/CLS derivable via PerformanceObserver; INP needs a scripted interaction
layout/recalc counters via Performance.getMetrics; compositor judgement assisted
